_comment: PORTED from the offline system (final_system.json) + JOINTLY recalibrated for COMBINED per-word FP < 2% (the offline thresholds were per-cell-only; running all 3 detectors on every word stacks FP to ~4.85%). Live-validated on the careful sessions (offline-faithful methodology, 206 words): combined FP 1.94%, detection i3rab 80% / tashkeel 91% / consonant 64% -- vs base-only at the same FP budget 49/72/57, so the decorrelated members (i3rabcontr, contr1000) are a real lift. Thresholds = joint-calibrated percentiles of live correct-margins. Data-limited (~170-206 careful words) -> monitor production FP; iqra (phoneme-CTC) is the deferred path to i3rab~94/consonant~92. Each member uses its own forced-alignment boundaries. Missing weights -> single-model fallback (load_ensemble_or_engine).
